headline: LMT vs. GD: Which Defense Stock Looks More Attractive Right Now?
summary: Both Lockheed Martin and General Dynamics are top-tier Pentagon contractors with diversified defense portfolios, including combat systems and naval programs.

headline: RTX Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Revenues Increase Y/Y
summary: RTX posts Q1 earnings and revenue beats, fueled by strong defense demand and backlog, as the aerospace giant raises its full-year 2026 outlook.

headline: Northrop Grumman Q1 Earnings Surpass Estimates, Sales Increase Y/Y
summary: NOC posts Q1 earnings beat with 1.3% EPS surge and higher sales, driven by strong aeronautics growth and lower costs.
